raw:
{
  "verses": [
    {
      "n": 51,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un ta ehdih̄s tawu Lohpu
Augtus / un tawas Seimmes
Augtus / kamehr tu tapfi tsdel-
dehts/ kas tew ne atlizzinah̄s Lab-
biblu / Wiḣnu ned̄s Ekti / tawu
Wehrcho Augumu / tawu fiḣko
Lohpu gannamus Pulkus / tee-
kams ta tew nomaita.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 52,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un winna spaidih̄s tew
wiḣṫas tawas Wahrtis / kamehr
tawee augstee Muhri krittihs/ us
to tu patahwees / wiḣṫa tawā
Semmē/ ko tas KUNGS taws
Deews tew dewis irr.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 53,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un tu ehdifi tawas Mee-
Gr: fas Angtus / tawu Dehlu un ta-
wu Meitu Meeju/ ko tas KUNGS
taws Deews tew dohs eeksch tahs
"
    },
    {
      "n": 54,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Apstahschanas / un eeksch tahs
Spaidischanas / ar ko tawi Ee-
naidneeki tew spaidibs.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 55,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un tas Wihrs / kas starp
jums mihksts un lohti kahrs bijis
irr/ ta pascha Azz buhs skandiga
prett fawu Brahti / un prett to
Seetwu fawā Klehpi/
"
    },
    {
      "n": 56,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un prett taweem atliffu-
scheem Dehleem/ kas tew atliffu-
schi irr / ka winch ne weenam no
tein fawu Dehlu Galtu dohd/
ko winch ehd / tapehz / ka tam ne
neeka irr atlizzis ta Apstahschana
un Spaidischana / ar ko taws
Eenaidneeks tew wiḣṫas tawās
tohpi.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 57,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Un prett to Behrnu/ ka
tik no winnas Meesas irr isgah-
jis / un prett fawu Dehlu / ko ta
irr dsemdejsi / jo winna ehdih̄-
tohs kleppeni/eeksch tahs wisfasch-
ki leelas Truhzibas / tai Apstah-
schanā un Spaidischana / ar ko
taws Eenaidneeks tew spaidih̄-
tawās Wahrtis.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 58,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Ja tu ne turrefi winue-
schihs Bauslibas Wahrdus / un
darrisi / kas schinni Grahmata-
rakstihts irr/ bihdamees ta KUN-
GA tawa Deewa gohdanu un
zeenanu Wahrdiu.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 59,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Tad darrihs tas KUNGS
tawas Mohzibas brihnistkas/lihs-
ar tawa Dsimmunna Mohzi-
bahn/ jo tahs buhs leelas un pa-
stahwigas Mohzibas/ un taunas
un pastahwigas Sehrgas.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 60,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Un winch greesih̄s us tew
wiḣṫas Egiptes Sehrgas/no ka tu
eʃi bihjajees / un tahs tew pee-
kahrfees.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 61,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Ir wiḣṫadas Sehrgas/un
wiḣṫadas Mohzibas / kas schinni
Bauslibas-Grahmata ne irr rak-
stitas / liks tas KUNGS pahr
tews nahkt / kamehr tu tsdeldehts
"
    },
    {
      "n": 62,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Un juhs tapfeet ar mas
Landim atlizzinati / kas juhs pir-
imak bijat ka tahs Debbes
Swatigsnas Pulkā / tapehz ka tu
"
    }
  ],
  "confidence": "high",
  "notes": ""
}
